mapper.select: /* MarketingMapper.getMarketingReSendTarget */ SELECT A.SEND_SEQ , A.DSTADDR AS mobileNo , A.CALLBACK AS sendNumber , A.MSG_TYPE AS msgType , A.SUBJECT AS subject , A.TEXT AS sendMessage , A.EXPIRETIME AS expireTime , A.OPT_ID AS templateId , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || '100000', 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') + ((1/24/60) * TRUNC((ROWNUM - 1) / 100) * 10), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS requestTime FROM ( SELECT A.SEND_SEQ , B.DSTADDR , B.CALLBACK , B.MSG_TYPE , B.SUBJECT , B.TEXT , B.EXPIRETIME , B.OPT_ID FROM MSP_SMS_SEND_MST A , MSG_QUEUE B WHERE A.SEND_REQ_DTTM LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' AND A.MSEQ = B.MSEQ UNION ALL SELECT A.SEND_SEQ , B.DSTADDR , B.CALLBACK , B.MSG_TYPE , B.SUBJECT , B.TEXT , B.EXPIRETIME , B.OPT_ID FROM MSP_SMS_SEND_MST A , MSG_RESULT B WHERE A.SEND_REQ_DTTM LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') || '%' AND A.MSEQ = B.MSEQ AND B.RESULT NOT IN ('100', '201') ) A
